This is apart of the KC giving grove.
https://kccg.my.site.com/Volunteer/s/

50 Asian pear trees, managed by Josh and I and our two children (ages 8 and 11). We welcome volunteers or enthusiasts to help with the harvest or visit the orchard. Access: Private
Wild blackberry bushes with thorns grow every summer (June/July). Accessible from the road, but be prepared for thorns, stink bugs, chiggers. Railroad tracks run by there too, trains are loud!
